issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text states 'during this turn' which indicates the effect lasts for the current turn only, not until end of turn.

Action type is 'ReturnToHand' but card text says 'place at the bottom of the owner's deck'. Correct action should be a deck placement action (no standard action exists; this requires custom handling or clarification of intent).
maxCost is 3 but card text specifies 'cost of 2 or less', so maxCost should be 2.
Second effect trigger is 'Trigger' which is vague. This should chain from the first effect (likely 'OnPlay' with chaining, or be part of a single multi-action effect).

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this turn. Then, place up to 1 Character with a cost of 2 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck.

actions.note: DSL lacks 'PlaceAtBottomOfDeck' action; ReturnToHand used as placeholder. Requires action type extension or clarification.
